issue_title: Fix skip audio notification not working on firefox
issue_body_preview:
- [x] I agree to license my contribution under GPL-3.0 and agree to allow distribution on app stores as outlined in [LICENSE-APPSTORE](https://github.com/ajayyy/SponsorBlock/blob/master/LICENSE-APPSTORE.txt)

To test this pull request, follow the [instructions in the wiki](https://github.com/ajayy
test_description_zh: 在 Firefox 浏览器中安装 SponsorBlock 扩展，打开一个包含赞助片段的 YouTube 视频，启用跳过时播放音频通知的设置，等待视频播放到赞助片段被自动跳过时，观察是否有音频通知播放。
expected_result_zh: 当视频播放到赞助片段并自动跳过时，Firefox 浏览器中应正常播放跳过音频通知提示音。
